suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny-validator workflow to explicitly handle Task subagent startup failures caused by invalid inherited model identifiers, with a documented fallback path for manual review or a known-good built-in model.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task invocations in this transcript-store scrutiny run failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16`, so the validator had to review the features and write the JSON reports manually. The same Task failure mode was already recorded in the prior axis-generation scrutiny synthesis, so this is now a repeated mission-level problem rather than a one-off.
